text:
Chronic Condition Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Pharmacy Characteristics │ April 2021 │ V 1.1 
3 
DME_SRVC_CD 
LABEL: 
Code Indicating the DME Services Offered 
DESCRIPTION: For pharmacies that indicated they offer some level of durable medical equipment (DME) (reference 
variable called DME_SRVC_IND), this variable identifies the type of DME services offered. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: DME_SRVC_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
NCDPD DataQ™ 
VALUES: 
13 = Site does not offer durable
